scripts.typecheck: bunx tsgo -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsgo -p packages/core/tsconfig.tests.json --noEmit && bunx tsgo -p packages/core/tsconfig.type-contracts.json --noEmit && bunx tsgo -p packages/react/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsgo -p packages/react/tsconfig.tests.json --noEmit && bunx tsgo -p packages/react/tsconfig.type-contracts.json --noEmit && bunx tsgo -p packages/rootstock/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsgo -p packages/rootstock/tsconfig.tests.json --noEmit && bunx tsgo -p packages/rootstock/tsconfig.type-contracts.json --noEmit
